scripts.encrypt: staticrypt src/index.html src/proposals/*.html -p $PASSWORD --short -d . --template-button 'Access' --template-color-primary '#2E3AC2' --template-color-secondary '#2E3AC2' --template-title 'TripWip' -t templates/password.html && mkdir -p proposals && mv *.html proposals/ 2>/dev/null; mv proposals/index.html . 2>/dev/null || true
